fields.name: Description
fields.default: The Drawstring Canister comes with multiple strap and handle options to adapt throughout your day.

default.title: Adventure-ready
default.description: The Drawstring Canister is water and tear resistant with durable canvas construction. This bag holds up to the demands of daily use.

default.title: Minimal and clean
default.description: Everything you need, nothing you don't. This bag has the simple, contemporary design that enables you to tell everyone about essentialism.

default.title: Organized
default.description: Never lose your snacks again with our patent-pending snack stash pocket system. With dedicated pouches for each of your snacking needs.
